verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We bow our hearts, We bend our knees, Oh Spirit come make us humble, We turn our eyes, From evil things, Oh Lord we cast down our idols.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So give us clean hands Give us pure hearts Let us not lift our souls to another So give us clean hands And give us pure hearts Let us not lift our souls to another.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh God let us be a generation that seeks, That seeks Your face, Oh, God of Jacob. Oh God let us be a generation that seeks, That seeks Your face, Oh, God of Jacob.
